props.name: countryRestriction
props.desc: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes to restrict suggestions (e.g. ["ZA","US"]).

props.name: debounce
props.desc: Milliseconds to wait after typing before querying the geocoding API.

props.name: latPriority
props.desc: Latitude bias for prioritising nearby results.

props.name: lngPriority
props.desc: Longitude bias for prioritising nearby results.

props.name: minCharactersSearch
props.desc: Minimum characters typed before the lookup fires.

props.name: prefix
props.desc: Text prepended to the stored address value.

props.name: radiusPriority
props.desc: Radius (km) around the lat/lng priority point.

props.name: onSelectCustom
props.desc: Called when the user selects an address suggestion. Return value is ignored.

props.name: enableMapInterface
props.desc: Show an interactive map alongside the address input.

props.name: defaultZoom
props.desc: Initial zoom level for the embedded map.

props.name: latitudePropertyName
props.desc: Form property name where latitude is stored.

props.name: longitudePropertyName
props.desc: Form property name where longitude is stored.

props.name: mapHeight
props.desc: Height of the embedded map in pixels.

props.name: mapWidth
props.desc: Width of the embedded map in pixels.

props.name: allowFreeText
props.desc: Allow the user to type a value that is not in the suggestion list.

props.name: dataSourceUrl
props.desc: API URL to fetch autocomplete suggestions from (used when dataSourceType is 'url').

props.name: disableSearch
props.desc: Disable the search input; show suggestions immediately.

props.name: displayPropName
props.desc: Entity property to display as the suggestion label.

props.name: displayValueFunc
props.desc: Receives the selected item object; return the string to display.

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person'). Used when dataSourceType is 'entitiesList'.

props.name: fields
props.desc: Entity property names to include in the query payload.

props.name: filter
props.desc: JSON Logic filter expression appended to every autocomplete query (see jsonlogic.com).

props.name: filterKeysFunc
props.desc: Return an array of property keys to include in the search payload.

props.name: grouping
props.desc: Grouping configuration applied to the suggestion list.

props.name: hideBorder
props.desc: Remove the border from the autocomplete input.

props.name: keyPropName
props.desc: Entity property used as the stored key value.

props.name: keyValueFunc
props.desc: Receives the selected item; return the key value to store.

props.name: mode
props.desc: Single-select or multi-select mode.

props.name: outcomeValueFunc
props.desc: Transform the selected item into the value stored on the form.

props.name: quickviewDisplayPropertyName
props.desc: Entity property shown in the quickview popup header.

props.name: quickviewEnabled
props.desc: Show a quickview popup when the user hovers over the selected value.

props.name: quickviewFormPath
props.desc: Form identifier for the quickview popup (module/name).

props.name: quickviewGetEntityUrl
props.desc: API URL to fetch the full entity record for the quickview.

props.name: quickviewWidth
props.desc: Width of the quickview popup in pixels.

props.name: queryParams
props.desc: Static query parameters appended to every autocomplete request.

props.name: sorting
props.desc: Default sort order applied to the suggestion list.

props.name: valueFormat
props.desc: Shape of the value stored when an item is selected.

props.name: allowClear
props.desc: Show a clear button to reset the color to empty.

props.name: disabledAlpha
props.desc: Hide the alpha channel slider.

props.name: showText
props.desc: Display the hex color code as text next to the swatch.

props.name: title
props.desc: Label text shown above the color swatch.

props.name: customColor
props.desc: CSS color applied to the custom icon.

props.name: customIcon
props.desc: SVG path or custom icon definition to display instead of an Ant Design icon.

props.name: defaultIcon
props.desc: Ant Design icon name shown when no value is selected (e.g. 'QuestionOutlined').

props.name: renderer
props.desc: HTML string or Handlebars template rendered inside the component.

props.name: allowedFileTypes
props.desc: MIME types or extensions accepted when uploading (e.g. ['image/png', '.jpg']).

props.name: allowPreview
props.desc: Show a lightbox preview when the image is clicked.

props.name: alt
props.desc: Alternative text for screen readers and broken-image fallback.

props.name: base64
props.desc: Base64-encoded image data URI (used when dataSource is 'base64').

props.name: dataSource
props.desc: Which source prop to use: url | storedFile | base64 | entityReference.

props.name: filter
props.desc: CSS filter effects applied to the image. Sub-properties: blur (px), brightness (1=normal), contrast (1=normal), grayscale (0–1), hueRotate (deg), invert (0–1), saturate (1=normal), sepia (0–1).

props.name: objectFit
props.desc: CSS object-fit for controlling how the image fills its container.

props.name: objectPosition
props.desc: CSS object-position (e.g. 'center', '50% 50%').

props.name: opacity
props.desc: CSS opacity (0 = transparent, 1 = opaque).

props.name: storedFileId
props.desc: GUID of the stored file record (used when dataSource is 'storedFile').

props.name: url
props.desc: Image URL (used when dataSource is 'url').

props.name: allowResizeX
props.desc: Allow horizontal resizing of the editor.

props.name: allowResizeY
props.desc: Allow vertical resizing of the editor.

props.name: askBeforePasteFromWord
props.desc: Prompt before pasting content copied from MS Word.

props.name: askBeforePasteHTML
props.desc: Prompt before pasting raw HTML.

props.name: autoHeight
props.desc: Grow the editor height automatically to fit content.

props.name: autoWidth
props.desc: Grow the editor width automatically.

props.name: defaultMode
props.desc: Starting editor mode: 1=WYSIWYG, 2=source, 3=split.

props.name: direction
props.desc: Text direction inside the editor.

props.name: disablePlugins
props.desc: List of Jodit plugin names to disable.

props.name: enter
props.desc: HTML element inserted when Enter is pressed.

props.name: iframe
props.desc: Render the editor content inside an iframe for CSS isolation.

props.name: insertImageAsBase64URI
props.desc: Embed inserted images as base64 URIs instead of uploading.

props.name: preset
props.desc: Editor configuration preset.

props.name: saveHeightInStorage
props.desc: Persist the editor height in localStorage between sessions.

props.name: saveModeInStorage
props.desc: Persist the editor mode in localStorage between sessions.

props.name: showCharsCounter
props.desc: Show character count in the editor status bar.

props.name: showWordsCounter
props.desc: Show word count in the editor status bar.

props.name: showXPathInStatusbar
props.desc: Show the XPath of the selected element in the status bar.

props.name: spellcheck
props.desc: Enable browser spell-checking inside the editor.

props.name: textIcons
props.desc: Use text labels instead of icons in the toolbar buttons.

props.name: theme
props.desc: Jodit UI theme name (e.g. 'default', 'dark').

props.name: toolbar
props.desc: Show the editor toolbar.

props.name: toolbarSticky
props.desc: Keep the toolbar visible when scrolling past the editor.

props.name: toolbarStickyOffset
props.desc: Top offset in pixels for the sticky toolbar.

props.name: useSearch
props.desc: Enable the find-and-replace functionality.

props.name: content
props.desc: Markdown text to render.

props.name: hideBorder
props.desc: Remove the container border.

props.name: remarkPlugins
props.desc: List of remark plugin names to extend the markdown parser.

props.name: circleStrokeColor
props.desc: Stroke color for circle and dashboard progress types.

props.name: format
props.desc: Display template for the progress label text (e.g. '{percent}%').

props.name: gapDegree
props.desc: Arc gap angle in degrees for dashboard type.

props.name: gapPosition
props.desc: Position of the arc gap for dashboard type.

props.name: lineStrokeColor
props.desc: Stroke color for line type.

props.name: percent
props.desc: Current progress as a plain number from 0 to 100 (no % sign).

props.name: showInfo
props.desc: Show the percentage text or format label.

props.name: steps
props.desc: Number of steps for a stepped progress bar.

props.name: strokeColor
props.desc: Default stroke color (overridden by lineStrokeColor / circleStrokeColor).

props.name: strokeLinecap
props.desc: Shape of the progress bar ends.

props.name: strokeWidth
props.desc: Width of the progress stroke in pixels.

props.name: success
props.desc: JSON string configuring the success segment ({ percent, strokeColor }).

props.name: trailColor
props.desc: Color of the unfilled portion of the progress track.

props.name: referenceListId
props.desc: Identifier of the reference list providing the status options.

props.name: showIcon
props.desc: Display the status icon alongside the label.

props.name: showReflistName
props.desc: Display the reference list name as a prefix.

props.name: solidBackground
props.desc: Use a solid background colour instead of an outlined badge.

props.name: mappings
props.desc: JSON-encoded object: { mapping: [{ code: number, text: string, color: string, override?: string }], default: { text: string, color: string, override?: string } }

props.name: value
props.desc: Manual value to display when valueSource is 'manual'.

props.name: valueSource
props.desc: Whether to use the bound form value or a manually configured value.

props.name: activeColor
props.desc: CSS color applied to the active/selected chevron item.

props.name: colorSource
props.desc: Whether to use the primary theme color, a custom color, or per-item colors from the reference list.

props.name: image
props.desc: URL of an image displayed inside the chevron items.

props.name: imageSize
props.desc: Size of the image in pixels.

props.name: imageStyle
props.desc: Render the image as a CSS background instead of an tag.

props.name: items
props.desc: Static chevron items used when not driven by a reference list.

props.name: referenceList
props.desc: Reference list used to populate chevron items dynamically.

props.name: showIcons
props.desc: Display icons from the reference list items.

props.name: actionConfiguration
props.desc: Action triggered when a card is clicked.

props.name: allowDelete
props.desc: Show a delete option on kanban cards.

props.name: allowEdit
props.desc: Show an edit option on kanban cards.

props.name: allowNewRecord
props.desc: Show a button to create new cards in each column.

props.name: collapsible
props.desc: Allow columns to be collapsed.

props.name: columnStyle
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to each column container.

props.name: createFormId
props.desc: Form used when creating a new card.

props.name: editFormId
props.desc: Form used when editing a card.

props.name: entityType
props.desc: Fully-qualified entity type for the kanban cards (e.g. 'Shesha.Core.Person').

props.name: fontColor
props.desc: CSS color applied to card text.

props.name: gap
props.desc: Gap between cards in pixels.

props.name: groupingProperty
props.desc: Entity property used to determine which column a card belongs to.

props.name: headerStyles
props.desc: Inline CSS applied to each column header.

props.name: items
props.desc: Column definitions for the kanban view.

props.name: kanbanReadonly
props.desc: Disable drag-and-drop and all edit actions.

props.name: modalFormId
props.desc: Form shown in a modal when a card is clicked.

props.name: referenceList
props.desc: Reference list that defines the kanban columns.

props.name: showIcons
props.desc: Display icons from the reference list in column headers.

props.name: displayPeriod
props.desc: Calendar views the user can switch between: 'month', 'week', 'work_week', 'day', 'agenda'.

props.name: dummyEventColor
props.desc: CSS color used for placeholder/dummy calendar events.

props.name: endDate
props.desc: ISO 8601 date string for the calendar's end boundary.

props.name: externalEndDate
props.desc: Form property name supplying the end date dynamically.

props.name: externalStartDate
props.desc: Form property name supplying the start date dynamically.

props.name: items
props.desc: Calendar layer configurations defining event data sources.

props.name: maxDate
props.desc: ISO 8601 date string; no navigation beyond this date.

props.name: minDate
props.desc: ISO 8601 date string; no navigation before this date.

props.name: momentLocale
props.desc: Moment.js locale string for day/month name formatting (e.g. 'en-gb', 'fr').

props.name: onSlotClick
props.desc: Action triggered when the user clicks an empty calendar slot.

props.name: onViewChange
props.desc: Action triggered when the user changes the view or navigates.

props.name: startDate
props.desc: ISO 8601 date string for the calendar's start boundary.
